name: Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lipton onion dry soup mix
1 can Campbell's cream of mushroom soup
3 medium celery stalks, cut 1/4 to 1/2 inch
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except potatoes in a stock pot.
2. Cook on low heat for about two hours.
3. Turn the heat up to medium-low and add the potatoes and approximately one cup more water.
4. Continue cooking for another three hours until the roast is tender.
Or:
1. Combine all ingredients, including potatoes, in a crockpot.
2. Cook on high until everything is tender.
